name: The Ascension Circle
description: Transhumanist zealots who read the voyage as a chrysalis — flesh is a first draft, to be rewritten in transit. They welcome every augmentation the ship can bear.

name: The Steel Covenant
description: Machinists and engineers who trust tools over doctrine. If a thing can be built, maintained, and improved, the Covenant will build it — and argue the theology later.

name: The Meridian Accord
description: Pragmatic administrators who hold the middle line, weighing each innovation against each tradition and committing wholly to neither.

name: The Hearth Union
description: Keepers of home and hearth who prize continuity — the shared meal, the remembered name — over the cold promise of the new.

name: The Verdant Kin
description: Soil-tenders who measure worth in living things. They distrust the sealed machine and keep the ship's green heart beating against the dark.

name: Keepers of the First Flame
description: Austere traditionalists who guard the founders' first covenant against every revision. To the Keepers, change is only a slower kind of forgetting.
log_name: the Keepers of the First Flame
